channel.title: Insurtech Insights
channel.description: In-depth coverage of how artificial intelligence is reshaping insurance — from claims automation to underwriting intelligence.

item.title: Why Policy Renewal Automation Needs an AI Reset — $1.2B in Preventable Attrition Hides in Plain Sight
item.description: In 2023, Allianz Life’s U.S. block alone lost $1.2B in annualized premiums to preventable renewal lapses, according to its 2023 Annual Report, p. 42. The...

item.title: Embedded insurance isn't embedded anymore — it's just AI, and most insurers still don't get it
item.description: In 2023, global embedded insurance premium volume reached $14 billion. By 2030, Allianz expects it to hit $750 billion. Yet 60% of these programs lose money in...

item.title: AI Anomaly Detection for Claims Fraud: A Practitioner’s Blueprint
item.description: Fraud costs U.S. property and casualty insurers roughly $34 billion annually—about 10% of all claims payments—per the FBI and Coalition Against Insurance...

item.title: Insurance Claims AI ROI Calculation Framework: A Practitioner’s Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: I’ve reviewed dozens of claims AI ROI models. Most overpromise by 300–500% because they ignore three critical inputs: claim leakage amortized over the policy...

item.title: Hiscox cut U.S. property quote cycle time from 14 days to 15 minutes — a 99% reduction
item.description: In June 2022, Hiscox’s U.S. small business unit rolled out an AI-driven straight-through processing (STP) engine for property quotes. The result: median quote...

item.description: In 2021, Zurich Canada's claims team processed more than 40,000 auto and property claims. Like most insurers, they knew fraud was inflating loss ratios but had...

item.description: In 2023, Lemonade’s AI claims chatbot paid out $8.2 million in claims in seconds, not days. By contrast, the industry’s average loss ratio sits at 68%, meaning...
